nasb.text: Then Abner said to Joab, “Now let the young men arise and hold a contest before us.” And Joab said, “Let them arise.”

esv.text: And Abner said to Joab, “Let the young men arise and compete before us.” And Joab said, “Let them arise.”

cnv.text: 押尼珥對約押說：“讓年輕人起來，在我們面前比比武。”約押說：“好！叫他們起來。”

ccb.text: 押尼珥对约押说：“让双方的青年起来在我们面前较量一下吧。”约押说：“好啊。”
